description:
You are managing the accounting for GAEC JOULIN farm. Create a new financial year in Ekylibre for the calendar year 2017 with a start date of January 1, 2017, and an end date of December 31, 2017, using EUR (Euro) as the currency. The Ekylibre interface is in French. 

Login credentials:
- Email: admin@ekylibre.org
- Password: 12345678
